objective: Stage 6 closeout for epic #650 governance policy refresh. All three child slices (F #651 STANDARDS.md corrections PR #679, G #652 hldpro-sim personas + AnthropicApiProvider previously merged, H #659 functional acceptance auditor CI gate PR #680) have merged with green CI. This plan records the epic-level closeout artifacts.
scope_boundary: Update OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md to add #650 to the Done table.
out_of_scope: Any changes to STANDARDS.md, hooks, existing workflows, scripts, or packages.
Re-opening or modifying any child slice (F #651, G #652, H #659) artifacts.
Any new CI workflows or test files.
Any changes to agent definitions or agent registry.
research_summary: Epic #650 governed a three-slice governance policy refresh: Slice F (#651) corrected STANDARDS.md §SoM (fallup direction, agent-agnostic language, QA cross-family prohibition, §PDCAR functional acceptance auditor gate, SOM-BOOTSTRAP-001 retirement) merged via PR #679; Slice G (#652) delivered hldpro-sim governance personas and AnthropicApiProvider, previously merged; Slice H (#659) wired the CI enforcement gate for the functional acceptance auditor PASS requirement via PR #680. All child slice CI gates passed before merge.

sprints.name: Epic #650 Stage 6 closeout artifacts
sprints.goal: File all Stage 6 closeout artifacts for epic #650: cross-review, execution scope, handoff, validation, closeout, and OVERLORD_BACKLOG update.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: raw/cross-review artifact exists and is dual-signed.
AC-3: OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md contains #650 in Done table.
AC-5: PR opened and URL returned.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm the epic closeout package is bounded to the write list, that all child slice AC evidence exists, and that no governance policy is being changed.
specialist_reviews.summary: OpenAI-family architecture review accepted the epic closeout package as bounded, additive, and correctly mapped to the PDCAR Stage 6 requirement.

alternate_model_review.summary: OpenAI-family cross-review accepted the implementation-ready epic closeout package. Anthropic-family worker executes bounded delivery.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: File all Stage 6 closeout artifacts for epic #650 under the named write boundary only. No code changes.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Create all bounded governance artifact files, run closeout hook, commit, push, and open PR.

material_deviation_rules: Any edit outside the user-provided allowed write paths is a material deviation.
Any change to STANDARDS.md, hooks, existing workflows, scripts, packages, or wiki paths is a material deviation.
Any closeout that omits the required validation or cross-review references is a material deviation.
Any modification to child slice artifacts (F #651, G #652, H #659) is a material deviation.
